---
title: "Descriptive Analysis"
subtitle: "Suicide Structural Determinants - COVID-19 Pandemic"
author: "Tu nombre"
date: today
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Cargar dataset analítico
dataset <- read_csv("../DATA/CLEAN/dataset_analitico_final.csv")

# Agregar región geográfica
dataset <- dataset %>%
  mutate(region = countrycode::countrycode(iso3, 
                                           origin = "iso3c", 
                                           destination = "region"))

cat("Dataset cargado:", nrow(dataset), "países\n")
glimpse(dataset)
```
